description:
# Close the PR-to-Merge Gap

Enable automatic PR merging — the single highest-impact change for autonomy. Features in 'review' status should auto-merge when CI passes.

## Phases
1. Global auto-merge setting toggle
2. Auto-resolve CodeRabbit review threads
3. EM agent merge execution
4. Scheduled PR merge poller
title: [Epic] Close the PR-to-Merge Gap
